chart_title: Declared concentration groups among enrolling students — Class of 2029
scope_note: Harvard's currently accessible official admissions statistics page publishes enrolling-student shares by broad concentration group, not a source-backed per-major registered-student breakdown. This panel now shows Harvard's exact official group-share labels instead of equal-weight placeholder bubbles or interpolated percentages.
notes: Method: values come directly from Harvard's official Admissions Statistics page for the Class of 2029. Because Harvard publishes one bucket as '<1%' and does not provide underlying per-major headcounts on this cited page, the panel renders an exact grouped-share list rather than a size-encoded bubble chart that would require invented interpolation.
